    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|y| - |x|), sq_nonneg (|y|), sq_nonneg (|x|), abs_nonneg y, abs_nonneg x]
  have h6 : |y^3 - x^3| < ε := by
    rw [h4]
    have h7 : |y^2 + y * x + x^2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h5
    have h8 : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
      linarith [h1, δle2]
    have h9 : 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 > 0 := by
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x|), abs_nonneg x]
    have h10 : |y - x| * |y^2 + y * x + x^2| < ε := by
      have h11 : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := h8
      have h12 : |y^2 + y * x + x^2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h7
      have h13 : 0 < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h9
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y^2 + y * x + x^2), abs_nonneg (y - x)]
    linarith
  simpa using h6

  have h6 : |(y - x) + x| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
